channel.title: Finance
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Finance, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Exclusive: Bain and Greylock bet $42 million that AI agents can finally fix cybersecurity’s messiest bottleneck
item.description: Cogent Security boasts an all-star AI team—and is promising to close the gap between finding software flaws and actually fixing them.

item.title: Netflix’s Best, Overlooked New Show Has A 91% Rotten Tomatoes Score
item.description: A new show has hit Netflix that is being overlooked by almost everyone, but it's got a high Rotten Tomatoes score and a great pedigree.

item.title: Federal judge rules on whether Buffalo Wild Wings can keep 'boneless wings' on menu
item.description: Federal judge dismisses Buffalo Wild Wings "boneless wings" lawsuit with pun-filled ruling, saying no reasonable consumer expects deboned wing meat.

item.title: Colbert’s CBS protest on YouTube viewed over 5 million times as he refuses to be silenced
item.description: Stephen Colbert isn't backing down in an extraordinary public dispute with his bosses at CBS over what he can air on his late-night talk show.

item.title: iPhone 17e And New MacBook Release Date Twist: Apple May Announce Products Early
item.description: Apple has confirmed a “Special Experience” for March 4, but a new report says that’s not when the products will be revealed.

item.title: ByteDance Says It Will Add Guardrails After Studios Complain About IP Violations
item.description: Last week, ByteDance introduced its Seedance 2.0 model. Hollywood and major studios quickly complained over AI’s use of celebrity likenesses.

item.title: New Amazon Attack Warnings — What 300 Million Customers Need To Know
item.description: As new warnings of attacks against Amazon users are posted to Facebook and X, here’s what you need to know and do.

item.title: Victoria’s Secret billionaire to face congressional grilling over long Epstein friendship behind closed doors
item.description: Les Wexner, 88, the retired founder of L Brands, plans to cooperate with a subpoena from Democrats on the House Oversight and Government Reform Commit...

item.title: Tesla dodges California license suspension after dropping misleading 'autopilot' marketing terms
item.description: Tesla avoids California license suspension after stopping "autopilot" use in marketing following state DMV order over misleading advertising practices...

item.title: Hyperliquid launches DeFi-focused policy shop led by prominent crypto lawyer Jake Chervinsky
item.description: The Hyperliquid Policy Center, backed by a $28 million donation, will focus on creating legal pathways for perpetual derivatives.

item.title: Quordle Hints And Answers For Thursday, February 19
item.description: Looking for some help with today’s Quordle words? Some hints and the answers are right here to give you a hand.

item.title: Zillow’s CTO says AI is reinventing every step of the home buying process
item.description: Zillow’s CTO David Beitel has led technology for the real estate website since its inception, with his north star focused on infusing technology acros...

item.title: What the ECB is saying after report Lagarde to step down early as president
Shutdown-delayed data on durable-goods orders and housing starts on daily agenda
Economic calendar: Minutes from January Fed meeting due this afternoon
Stanley Druckenmiller's big bet in the fourth quarter already is paying off
Orders for U.S. durable goods declined in December. Boeing was a big reason.
Federal fraud is double previous estimates, LexisNexis Risk Solutions CEO says
item.description: The federal government is hemorrhaging about $1 trillion per year due to fraud, CEO of LexisNexis Special Services & LexisNexis Risk Solutions Governm...

item.title: Trump touts potential 20% tax refunds from 'Big Beautiful Bill'
item.description: President Donald Trump said tax refunds could exceed 20% this year thanks to his "One Big Beautiful Bill," eliminating taxes on tips, Social Security ...

item.title: Texas capital’s household growth surges, far outpacing national rate
item.description: Austin's population boom spans all ages as NAR data shows young professionals and seniors driving household growth, creating diverse housing demand ac...

item.title: Reid Hoffman Raises $24.6 Million for AI Cancer-Research Startup
item.description: The LinkedIn co-founder is starting Manas AI with “The Emperor of All Maladies” author Siddhartha Mukherjee.

item.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

item.title: Silicon Valley Is Raving About a Made-in-China AI Model
item.description: DeepSeek is called “amazing and impressive” despite working with less-advanced chips.

item.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
item.description: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.

item.title: Can an App Replace a Personal Trainer? I Tested Nearly a Dozen to Find Out
item.description: Apps can add flexibility and freshness to your routine. Just try not to get injured.
